home.heroDesc: Careme connects patient owners with verified, experienced caregivers. Book home or hospital care with certified professionals. Your peace of mind starts here.
home.feat1Desc: All caregivers undergo identity verification and background checks.
home.feat2Desc: View profiles with experience, qualifications, and certificates.
home.feat3Desc: Book for home care or hospital with ward and bed details.
home.feat4Desc: Accept or cancel bookings with full transparency.
home.ctaDesc: Join as a patient owner to book care, or as a caregiver to offer your services.

auth.joinAs: Join Careme as a caregiver or patient owner
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a reset link

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeCaregiver: Welcome back, {name}. Here's an overview of your activity.
dashboard.welcomePatient: Welcome back, {name}. Track your caregiver bookings here.
dashboard.noBookingsCaregiverDesc: Patient owners will see your profile and can request your services.

caregivers.title: Find Caregivers
caregivers.description: Browse verified caregivers. View profiles, experience, and book the right fit.
caregivers.noCaregiversDesc: Check back soon or sign up as a caregiver.

caregiverProfile.logInToBook: Log in as a patient owner to book this caregiver.

bookingFlow.bookDesc: Complete the form below to request care. The caregiver will review and confirm.
bookingFlow.successDesc: Your booking request has been confirmed securely via Stripe. The caregiver has been notified.
bookingFlow.cancelDesc: The booking request was not completed because the payment was cancelled. You have not been charged.
bookingFlow.toastEnterWardBed: Please enter ward number and bed number
bookingFlow.toastDates: Please select start and end dates

profile.title: Profile
profile.welcomePending: Welcome to Careme! Complete your profile below and submit it for admin review.
profile.setupProfileDesc: A complete profile helps you get booked faster. Add your basic details, experience, and certificates.
profile.liveDesc: Your profile is visible to patient owners. You can continue receiving bookings!
profile.reviewDesc: Your profile is currently being reviewed by our team. You will be notified once it is approved.
profile.rejectedDesc: Your profile review was not successful. Please see the reason below, update your profile, and resubmit.
profile.suspendedDesc: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support for more information.
profile.hiddenDesc: Your profile is hidden. You must add a bio and hourly rate, then submit for review to go live.
profile.editPublicDesc: Make updates to your public caregiver listing and adjust your hourly rate or specializations.
profile.patientProfileDesc: Update your personal care information. This helps caregivers understand your needs better.

profileForm.avatarHelpText: Clear profile pictures help build trust with other users. Supports JPG, PNG, and WebP.
profileForm.bioPlaceholder: Tell patients about yourself and your caregiving approach...
profileForm.title: Title

error.title: Something went wrong
error.desc: We apologize for the inconvenience. Our team has been notified.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or doesn't exist.
